PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel ?partyLabel ?ideologyLabel
WHERE {
  VALUES ?country { wd:Q35 wd:Q20 wd:Q34 } # Denmark, Norway, Sweden
  ?country wdt:P6 ?pm.
  ?pm wdt:P102 ?party.
  ?party wdt:P1142 ?ideology.
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel.
  ?party rdfs:label ?partyLabel.
  ?ideology rdfs:label ?ideologyLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?partyLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?ideologyLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY ?country
